lore.item.dual_stance.heart_seal: When two players use a Heart Seal on each other, they will become paired and support each other! Attach a crest to determine the pair up bonus.
lore.item.dual_stance.peace_crest: Attach a crest to a Heart Seal to determine its pair up bonus. This crest has protective properties.
lore.item.dual_stance.bones_crest: Attach a crest to a Heart Seal to determine its pair up bonus. This crest gives you faster fingers.
lore.item.dual_stance.emblem_crest: Attach a crest to a Heart Seal to determine its pair up bonus. This crest has healing properties.
lore.item.dual_stance.shells_crest: Attach a crest to a Heart Seal to determine its pair up bonus. This crest is said to provide nourishment.
lore.item.dual_stance.stone_crest: Attach a crest to a Heart Seal to determine its pair up bonus. This crest has strength-enhancing properties.
lore.item.dual_stance.specter_crest: Attach a crest to a Heart Seal to determine its pair up bonus. This crest gives you some more mobility.
lore.item.dual_stance.pacifism_crest: Attach this crest to a Heart Seal to designate your pair up partner as your protector. Provides pacifism and invulnerability.
lore.item.dual_stance.enchanter_crest: Attach this crest to a Heart Seal to designate your pair up partner as your protector. A powerful crest that enhances your ally at the cost of your power and defense.
lore.item.dual_stance.hatred_crest: Attach this crest to a Heart Seal to imbue yourself with hatred while paired. A powerful crest that enhances your power at the cost of nearly all defense.
item.dual_stance.heart_seal.empty_descri: Attach a Crest to boost your bond
gamerule.dual_stance.allow_pairing_with_: Whether players are able to use a Heart Seal on a mob to pair up with them.
dual_stance.peace_crest.bones_crest.comb: Nimble Shield: 10% chance to negate damage taken, up to 20% based on proximity. Haste I
dual_stance.peace_crest.stone_crest.comb: Towering Shield: Increases size slightly, and increases step height by 0.5 blocks. Strength I
dual_stance.peace_crest.emblems_crest.co: Shield Everlasting: 10% chance to negate damage taken, up to 20% based on proximity. Regeneration I
dual_stance.peace_crest.specters_crest.c: Shield Skater: increased range before bond breaks. Speed I
dual_stance.peace_crest.shells_crest.com: Clam Shield: Fire Resistance and Water Breathing
